tool.name: OGS: identifySubdomains
tool.description: Galaxy wrapper for the OGS utility 'identifySubdomains'.
tool.command: mkdir inputs; # Verzeichnis für saubere Trennung #for $m in $mesh: ln -s "$m" "inputs/${m.element_identifier}"; #end for #for $m in $subdomain_meshes_filenames: ln -s "$m" "inputs/${m.element_identifier}"; #end for identifySubdomains $force --output_prefix '$output_prefix' --searchlength '$searchlength' #for $m in $mesh: --mesh "inputs/${m.element_identifier}" #end for #for $m in $subdomain_meshes_filenames: "inputs/${m.element_identifier}" #end for

param.name: output_prefix
param.label: output prefix
param.help: Output. Prefix the subdomain meshes' filenames with the output prefix/path.

param.name: searchlength
param.label: searchlength
param.help: search length determining radius for the node search algorithm. Non-negative floating point number (min = 0)

param.name: mesh
param.label: mesh
param.help: Input (.vtu). The file the bulk mesh

tool.help: This tool runs the **identifySubdomains** utility from the OpenGeoSys suite.
